title: PPL: Still A 'Hold', Despite A Double-Digit Downturn
text: PPL Corporation's valuation relative to potential upside in the current macro environment does not make sense. PPL has a strong balance sheet and offers 6-8% annual EPS and dividend growth until 2026E. The company's valuation is still above 16x normalized, making it difficult to achieve a 15% annualized rate of return.

title: PPL: A Similar Story Again
text: PPL made transformative moves in 2021, divesting its UK assets and acquiring Narragansett in the US. The company's focus on dividends has hurt its long-term prospects, with high payout ratios and increasing net debt levels. Second quarter results were weaker than expected, with net debt ticking up and capital spending set to rise further.

title: Rhode Island Energy Financial Statements Now Available on PPL Corporation's Website
text: ALLENTOWN, Pa. , Sept. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PPL Corporation (NYSE: PPL) today announced that it has published three years of audited annual financial statements for The Narragansett Electric Company, a PPL subsidiary doing business as Rhode Island Energy (RIE).
